gt_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM constructorStandings AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT c.name FROM constructorStandings cs JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorId = c.constructorId ORDER BY cs.points DESC LIMIT 1;
question: Which constructor has the highest point?
